subject: Disclosure of material issue
description: The Board of Directors at its meeting held today, viz. February 5, 2026, has considered and approved interim dividend @5,500% i.e. Rs. 110 per equity share for the financial year 2025-26. Accordingly, the Board has fixed February 11, 2026 as record date for determining entitlement of members for the purpose of payment of interim dividend. The payment of interim dividend will be completed by March 7, 2026.
